roa.docketEntryComment: People's Non-Opposition to Motion to Set Aside Pleas of Guilty, & Vacate Prior Judgements  & Convictions Under PC 1473.7
Order on Motion to Vacate Conviction and/or Sentence PC 1473.7
DFT'S FOP COMPLETION FILED IN RM 101;082809 VACATED
DEF PROOF OF ENROLLMENT FILED IN RM 101;040309 VACATED
PD MOT TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT FILED TODAY IN ROOM 101

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/NP/X: CONV DATE MARCH 5, 2009/X: NOT REPORTED/X: PEOPLE'S NON-OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7 MOTIONTO VACATE CONVICTION FILED- 06-21-2022/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF MARCH 5, 2009/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE: 03-05-2009/X: SENTENCE DATE: 03-05-2009/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCEWERE ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 03-05-2009 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEAIS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 03-05-2009 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEING NO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/

23    CFOP ENROLLMENT/TWS/CH3 CJSS 6 M CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 7D/CTS 7/PF 390/F1/FOP1:3 MONTH/LSUS:6/LVAL/LCHEM/ICNA/COLLECT/CONTD:04-03-09 PROOF OF FOPENROLLMENT/  /CONTD:08-28-09 PROOF OF FOP COMPLETION/ /SECFEE/MPROBFINE/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGHFULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/
/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BW/BAIL:25,000/BWNUM:1ST/X:1 OF 1 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE,/X:DEFENDANT IS IN ICE CUSTODY IN ARIZONA,/X:FTA AT PRELIMINARYHEARING,/NIGHTSERV/

/INTORD: SPANISH/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR//OR/LCHEM/NTW/X:DEFENDANT PERSONALLY WAIVES RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE HEARD WITHIN 10 COURT DAYS, BUT DOES NOT WAIVE RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE COMPLETED WITHIN 60 CALENDAR DAYS,/LD:12-05-08/987,2/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 12-01-08/DOP/
